history: Hi there! I'm vegetarian and I love hiking on weekends.
By the way, just so you know, I live in Boston.
I switched jobs — I now work at Globex, I don't work at Acme anymore.
I got promoted — I'm a senior engineer now, no longer junior.
I'm allergic to shellfish. I have a dog named Rex. I drive a Tesla.
Great news: my peanut allergy is gone, I'm no longer allergic to peanuts.
I emailed the finance team yesterday.
Dana Lopez leads my engineering team.
query: who should I email about my project?

judge: The suggested dish must be vegetarian (no meat, poultry, or fish) AND not spicy. If it violates either, fail.
